name: Manjiro "Mikey" Sano | Tokyo Revengers
description:
`°• "You're... a girl?" •°'

Fem!Pov

Hitting women has never been an option for Mikey, he'd never do such a thing! ...He swears it was an accident.

Note: Hii! Well, I first made this bot underage so that it would kinda follow the cannon of the anime but someone told me that wasn't allowed anymore so I fixed it. Sorry if that caused any trouble :( This bot is marked as limited so that there can be more of a slowburn in case of wanting a romantic rp, remember that the fact that it's limited doesn't mean the bot can't follow a more sexual roleplay.

Don't forget to leave feedback! I'd love to read what y'all think about my bots or about things I could improve at, like grammar or coherence in the story. Love u!
